caption: A man with glasses and medium-length brown hair stands indoors against a plain, light-colored wall with a horizontal trim line. He is wearing a black t-shirt featuring a graphic of a man's face and the partially visible text "Knuth", along with a blue lanyard and an identification badge hanging around his neck. As the scene progresses, the man speaks and gesticulates with his hands. In the beginning, his hands are positioned low in front of his waist. He then raises his right hand, curling his fingers as if holding a small object or making a point. He continues to move his hands in front of his chest, shifting his grip and posture while maintaining his focused expression and speaking toward someone off-screen. A black office chair is partially visible in the lower foreground of the scene.
